'Ndrina Fruci.description: The 'Ndrina Fruci is a 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta, a criminal organization based in Calabria, Italy. It operates primarily in the province of Crotone and is involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and other illegal activities. The clan has been targeted in several police operations, including 'Prima', 'Effetto Domino', and 'Imponimento'. Key members include Giuseppe Fruci and Vincenzo Fruci.

descriptions: Anello and Fruci were targeted together in Operation Prima, indicating alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: 7 gennaio 2003 - Operazione Prima contro gli Anello- Fruci e i Vallelunga

descriptions: The Fruci and Anello clans were jointly targeted in Operation Prima, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: 7 gennaio 2003 - Operazione "Prima" contro gli Anello -Fruci e i Vallelunga .

descriptions: The Fruci and Cerra-Torcasio-Gualtieri clans were jointly targeted in Operation Effetto Domino, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: 5 giugno 2008 - Operazione "Effetto Domino" contro gli Anello -Fruci, i Cerra-Torcasio-Gualtieri , gli Iannazzo e i Passafaro .

descriptions: The Fruci and Iannazzo clans were jointly targeted in Operation Effetto Domino, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: 5 giugno 2008 - Operazione "Effetto Domino" contro gli Anello -Fruci, i Cerra-Torcasio-Gualtieri , gli Iannazzo e i Passafaro .

descriptions: The Fruci and Passafaro clans were jointly targeted in Operation Effetto Domino, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: 5 giugno 2008 - Operazione "Effetto Domino" contro gli Anello -Fruci, i Cerra-Torcasio-Gualtieri , gli Iannazzo e i Passafaro .

descriptions: The Fruci and Vallelunga clans were both targeted in Operation Prima, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: 7 gennaio 2003 - Operazione "Prima" contro gli Anello -Fruci e i Vallelunga .

Clan dei catanesi.description: The Clan dei catanesi was a criminal organization based in Turin, Italy, composed mainly of members from Catania, Sicily. It was a branch of the Cursoti clan and was active until the mid-1980s, when it was dismantled by arrests and defections. The group controlled gambling, prostitution, and heroin trafficking in Turin, and was involved in numerous murders and kidnappings.

descriptions: Clan dei Catanesi operated in agreement with 'Ndrangheta in the drug business.
edges.evidence_quote: il cosiddetto clan dei Catanesi operativo a Torino e Milano, dove si impose con metodi violenti e spregiudicati nel nascente business della droga in accordo con la 'ndrangheta

descriptions: Clan dei Catanesi gave way to the dominant local 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: cedendo il passo all'ormai dominante 'Ndrangheta locale

descriptions: Clan dei Catanesi sold drugs to their Calabrian allies, the Belfiore.
edges.evidence_quote: I Miano si rifornivano di droga ... e successivamente la rivendevano ai loro alleati calabresi, i Belfiore e gli Ursino

descriptions: Clan dei Catanesi sold drugs to their Calabrian allies, the Ursino.
edges.evidence_quote: I Miano si rifornivano di droga ... e successivamente la rivendevano ai loro alleati calabresi, i Belfiore e gli Ursino

descriptions: Clan dei Catanesi was the Turin branch of the Cursoti clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan dei Catanesi ... era la frangia torinese del clan catanese dei Cursoti

descriptions: Vicious Circle is subservient to Nazi Lowriders.
edges.evidence_quote: Many of these Peckerwood gangs in California are subservient to the authority of Nazi Lowriders, which includes the punk gangs Vicious Circle and La Mirada Punks, as well as Insane White Boys, Independent Skins, Orange County Skins, and a rigid alliance with Southern California Skinhead Alliance (SoCal Skins).

descriptions: Lebanese mafia is allied with Nomads MC per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: American Mafia , Armenian mafia , Colombian cartels , Comanchero MC , Corsican mafia , Greek mafia , Romanian Mafia , Hells Angels MC , Mongols MC , Nomads MC , Notorious MC , Sicilian Mafia

descriptions: Los Chimales is listed as an ally of Los Ninis in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel , Los Chapitos , Los Chimales , Gente Nueva

descriptions: The Hook Gang had a rivalry with the Patsy Conroy Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Patsy Conroy Gang , Short Tails

descriptions: The Red Scorpions list Russian mafia as allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Russian mafia (bratva)

descriptions: The Cali KGB Cartel supplied cocaine to the Uzbek criminal network.
edges.evidence_quote: The Colombia-based Cali KGB Cartel supplied cocaine to this network, too.

Bra Boys.description: The Bra Boys are a gang centered on surf culture, founded and based in Maroubra, Sydney, Australia in the 1990s. They have gained notoriety through violence and alleged links to organized crime, as well as some community activism. The gang achieved national and international media attention in 2007 with the release of a documentary titled 'Bra Boys: Blood Is Thicker than Water'.

descriptions: Bra Boys and Comanchero Motorcycle Club held a joint media conference to declare peace after the Cronulla riots.
edges.evidence_quote: Afterwards the Abberton brothers then held a joint media conference with members the Comanchero Motorcycle Club (a bikie gang , who include many Lebanese as their members) to help ease tensions, declaring peace.

descriptions: Bra Boys members are associated with the North Maroubra Surf Riders.
edges.evidence_quote: The group is often linked with the North Maroubra Surf Riders (NMSR), with which a number of its members are associated.

descriptions: Bandidos retaliated against Banshees with bombings after a fatal confrontation.
edges.evidence_quote: Bandidos national president Ronald Jerome "Ronnie" Hodge ordered retaliation against the Banshees at a meeting of national officers in Houston on May 5, 1983, and club members subsequently organized plans to carry out bombings against their rivals.

descriptions: Ghost Riders allied with Banshees after leaving Bandidos.
edges.evidence_quote: The Ghost Riders were initially formed as a Bandidos support club before drifting beyond the Bandidos' control and forming an alliance with the Banshees MC.

descriptions: Ascione and Luongo formed a secret agreement to resist arrests and convictions.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel settembre 2019 emerge un accordo segreto tra due cosche specializzate in spaccio ed estorsioni. Da una parte gli Ascione-Papale, organizzazione criminale attiva a Ercolano e Torre del Greco . Dall’altra, la famiglia Luongo, dinastia della malavita con base a San Giorgio a Cremano .

descriptions: Al-Nusra Front opposed Yarmouk Martyrs Brigade.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Yarmouk Martyrs Brigade

descriptions: Al-Nusra opposed Yarmouk Martyrs Brigade.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Yarmouk Martyrs Brigade

descriptions: Yarmouk Martyrs Brigade is an opponent.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: Yarmouk Martyrs Brigade

descriptions: The Calabrese Family is a subgroup of 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: The organisation had a strong rivalry with the Honoured Society and the Calabrese Family, both of which were Calabrian 'Ndrangheta groups also based in Melbourne.

descriptions: Calabrese Family was absorbed by Honoured Society since early 2000s.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Calabrese Family (since the beginning of the 2000s absorbed by Honoured Society)

descriptions: Carlton Crew had a strong rivalry with the Calabrese Family.
edges.evidence_quote: The organisation had a strong rivalry with the Honoured Society and the Calabrese Family, both of which were Calabrian 'Ndrangheta groups also based in Melbourne.

descriptions: The Carlton Crew was a fierce rival to the Calabrese Family.
edges.evidence_quote: The organisation was a fierce rival to the Honoured Society and the Calabrese Family

descriptions: The Carlton Crew was rivals with the Calabrese Family until the early 90s.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Williams Syndicate, Honoured Society and Calabrese Family (until the early 90s)

descriptions: The Carlton Crew became allies with the Calabrese Family since the mid-90s.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Honoured Society and Calabrese Family (since the mid-90s)

descriptions: Byrd Gang has Goonie Gang as a rival according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Ghost Gang Goonie Gang, Young Melph Mafia St Bernard Projects

descriptions: Brim affiliates backed S.M.M. during the Wet T-Shirt War.
edges.evidence_quote: S.M.M., backed by Brim affiliates, asserted sovereignty from Billy and G-Shyne structures.

descriptions: Bandidos members shot two Apocalypse Riders members.
edges.evidence_quote: Members of the Bandidos' Marseille, Montpellier and Metz chapters organized the 7 May 1995 shooting of two members of the Apocalypse Riders, a Hells Angels support club, in Créancey which left both men wounded and one, Jérôme Parent, paraplegic.

descriptions: Apocalypse Riders are a Hells Angels support club.
edges.evidence_quote: Members of the Bandidos' Marseille, Montpellier and Metz chapters organized the 7 May 1995 shooting of two members of the Apocalypse Riders, a Hells Angels support club, in Créancey which left both men wounded and one, Jérôme Parent, paraplegic.

descriptions: Prairie Fire Collective is a splinter faction of the Weather Underground.
edges.evidence_quote: by the late 1970s, the Weatherman group had further split into two factions—the May 19th Communist Organization and the Prairie Fire Collective

descriptions: Nuova Famiglia Salentina aggregated former members of Famiglia Salentina Libera.
edges.evidence_quote: A seguito della "pace" stipulata da Pantaleo De Matteis (detto Pantaluccio) e dal cognato Salvatore Rizzo con la SCU di Rogoli, nel 1986 nacque nel carcere di Lecce la Nuova Famiglia Salentina, aggregando i vecchi associati della Famiglia Salentina Libera

descriptions: FSL changed its name to Nuova Famiglia Salentina.
edges.evidence_quote: la Famiglia Salentina Libera, guidata dal boss leccese Salvatore Rizzo e dal cognato Pantaleo De Matteis, che cambiò nome in Nuova Famiglia Salentina (NFL)

descriptions: Nuova Famiglia Salentina was formed after a peace agreement with SCU.
edges.evidence_quote: A seguito della "pace" stipulata da Pantaleo De Matteis (detto Pantaluccio) e dal cognato Salvatore Rizzo con la SCU di Rogoli, nel 1986 nacque nel carcere di Lecce la Nuova Famiglia Salentina

descriptions: Nuova Famiglia Salentina fought a feud against SCU's clans in Lecce.
edges.evidence_quote: Nuova Famiglia Salentina : formed in 1986 by De Matteis Pantaleo, from Lecce and stemming from the Famiglia Salentina Libera born in the early 1980s as an autonomous criminal movement in the Salento area with no links with extra-regional Mafia expressions, the organization fought a feud against SCU's clans in Lecce;

descriptions: SCU and NFL (formerly FSL) made peace in Lecce prison.
edges.evidence_quote: la pace siglata nel carcere di Lecce tra Pino Rogoli e la Famiglia Salentina Libera, guidata dal boss leccese Salvatore Rizzo e dal cognato Pantaleo De Matteis, che cambiò nome in Nuova Famiglia Salentina (NFL)

Pueblos Unidos.description: Mexican criminal group active in Michoacán, founded in 2021 as a self-defense group for avocado farmers but degenerated into a criminal racketeering organization. Possibly tied to La Resistencia. Led by José Artemio Maldonado, a major fuel thief involved in the Tula prison break.

descriptions: Pueblos Unidos is suggested to be tied to La Resistencia, but the nature is unspecified.
edges.evidence_quote: It has been suggested that the group is tied to the gang La Resistencia .

descriptions: Pueblos Unidos initially defended farmers against Jalisco New Generation, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: It began in 2021 as a self-defense group defending the local avocado farmers from cartel gangs Los Viagras and Jalisco New Generation

descriptions: Pueblos Unidos initially defended farmers against Los Viagras, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: It began in 2021 as a self-defense group defending the local avocado farmers from cartel gangs Los Viagras and Jalisco New Generation

descriptions: Barillaro and Zucco were allied in the Faida di Ciminà.
edges.evidence_quote: scoppia la cosiddetta faida di Ciminà in cui vengono coinvolte le famiglie Barillaro-Romano-Zucco da una parte, e i Varacalli-Franco-Polifroni-Spagnolo dall'altra

descriptions: Romano and Zucco were allied in the Faida di Ciminà.
edges.evidence_quote: scoppia la cosiddetta faida di Ciminà in cui vengono coinvolte le famiglie Barillaro-Romano-Zucco da una parte, e i Varacalli-Franco-Polifroni-Spagnolo dall'altra

descriptions: Zucco and Franco were opposing sides in the Faida di Ciminà.
edges.evidence_quote: scoppia la cosiddetta faida di Ciminà in cui vengono coinvolte le famiglie Barillaro-Romano-Zucco da una parte, e i Varacalli-Franco-Polifroni-Spagnolo dall'altra

descriptions: Zucco and Varacalli were opposing sides in the Faida di Ciminà.
edges.evidence_quote: scoppia la cosiddetta faida di Ciminà in cui vengono coinvolte le famiglie Barillaro-Romano-Zucco da una parte, e i Varacalli-Franco-Polifroni-Spagnolo dall'altra

descriptions: Zucco and Polifroni were opposing sides in the Faida di Ciminà.
edges.evidence_quote: scoppia la cosiddetta faida di Ciminà in cui vengono coinvolte le famiglie Barillaro-Romano-Zucco da una parte, e i Varacalli-Franco-Polifroni-Spagnolo dall'altra

descriptions: Zucco and Spagnolo were opposing sides in the Faida di Ciminà.
edges.evidence_quote: scoppia la cosiddetta faida di Ciminà in cui vengono coinvolte le famiglie Barillaro-Romano-Zucco da una parte, e i Varacalli-Franco-Polifroni-Spagnolo dall'altra

Nuova Camorra Organizzata.description: The Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO) was an Italian Camorra criminal organization founded in the late 1970s by Raffaele Cutolo in Campania. It was a structured, hierarchical group that engaged in racketeering, drug trafficking, and extortion, becoming one of the most powerful criminal organizations in Italy by 1981. The NCO was hostile to the Sicilian Mafia but allied with 'Ndrangheta clans. It was considered extinct by the late 1980s after many members were killed or imprisoned.

descriptions: Cutolo was affiliated with 'Ndrangheta, and NCO modeled itself on 'Ndrangheta's rules.
edges.evidence_quote: Raffaele Cutolo con la fondazione della Nuova Camorra Organizzata (N.C.O.), che si rifaceva alle regole e alle gerarchie della camorra ottocentesca e della 'ndrangheta (alla quale Cutolo era affiliato)

descriptions: De Stefano cooperated with NCO to kill Tripodo.
edges.evidence_quote: Domenico Tripodo fu arrestato il 21 febbraio 1975 e incarcerato alla prigione di Poggioreale a Napoli e fu ucciso il 26 agosto 1976 in cella su richiesta di Paolo De Stefano dalla Nuova Camorra Organizzata di Raffaele Cutolo che lavorava con loro nel traffico di droga.

descriptions: Turatello had contacts with both Sicilian Mafia and Neapolitan Camorristi, implying a cooperative relationship between the organizations.
edges.evidence_quote: Turatello had close allies and powerful contacts within the Sicilian Mafia, and throughout his criminal career was always in contact with Sicilian Mafiosi and Neapolitan Camorristi.

descriptions: Nicolino Selis, a member of the Banda della Magliana, had a close friendship with Raffaele Cutolo, founder of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: una stretta amicizia con il boss campano Raffaele Cutolo, fondatore della Nuova Camorra Organizzata

descriptions: Banda della Magliana and Nuova Camorra Organizzata cooperated: Cutolo gave approval for a murder and established a drug supply channel.
edges.evidence_quote: La decisione di uccidere Nicolini venne presa dalla banda anche in virtù del beneplacito, ottenuto dal capo della Nuova Camorra Organizzata , Raffaele Cutolo , il quale, appena evaso dall'ospedale psichiatrico di Aversa, nel febbraio del 1978 organizzò un incontro con Nicolino Selis allo scopo di trovare, tra i rispettivi gruppi, una strategia compatibile con gli obiettivi di entrambi, nominando così “il Sardo” suo luogotenente nella piazza romana.

descriptions: Raffaele Cutolo of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata contacted the Banda della Magliana to locate Aldo Moro's prison.
edges.evidence_quote: Cutolo ci ha mandato un personaggio politico a parlare per vedere se sapevamo dov'era il covo di Moro

descriptions: Claudio Sicilia served as a link between Banda della Magliana and Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: Claudio Sicilia ... diviene ben presto l'anello di congiunzione della banda con la Nuova Camorra Organizzata di Raffaele Cutolo.

descriptions: Aldo Semerari made deals with both NCO and NF, but the text does not assert a direct relationship between Banda della Magliana and NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: He had made the same deal with Raffaele Cutolo's Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO), as well as with the rival organization of the Cutolo, the Nuova Famiglia (NF) headed by Carmine Alfieri.

descriptions: Camorra branches in Campania competed with Nuova Camorra Organizzata, resulting in hundreds of deaths.
edges.evidence_quote: i camorristi campani furono ammessi in Cosa nostra e formarono delle succursali in Campania, che entrarono in competizione con la Nuova Camorra Organizzata di Raffaele Cutolo con un bilancio di centinaia di morti ammazzati nel periodo 1979-1984.

descriptions: The New Organized Camorra was an attempt to unify Camorra families, thus a faction within the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Raffaele Cutolo made an unsuccessful attempt to unify the Camorra families ... by forming the New Organized Camorra (Nuova Camorra Organizzata or NCO).

descriptions: NCO is a Camorra organization.
edges.evidence_quote: Raffaele Cutolo, the boss of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO)

descriptions: Nuova Camorra Organizzata is a Camorra organization, part of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Antonio's father was a member of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata , and died from natural causes in 2008 after 18 years in jail.

descriptions: The Casalesi clan fought against Nuova Camorra Organizzata led by Cutolo.
edges.evidence_quote: During the Camorra war of the 1980s, the Casalesi sided with Nuova Famiglia against Raffaele Cutolo.

descriptions: The Casalesi fought a war against the Nuova Camorra Organizzata, killing four of its members.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto un ruolo chiave nella guerra dei Casalesi contro la Nuova Camorra Organizzata, partecipando ai famigerati omicidi Pagano-Mennillo-Orsi-Gagliardi

descriptions: The Casalesi clan families allied with the Nuova Camorra Organizzata in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: Questi clan familiari negli anni '70 si erano legati alla Nuova Camorra Organizzata fondata nel 1970 da Raffaele Cutolo

descriptions: Alfieri clan opposed NCO as part of the Nuova Famiglia alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: He was an important founding member of the Nuova Famiglia alliance (NF) that was formed to contrast the growing power of Raffaele Cutolo 's Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO) in the early eighties.

descriptions: Clan Alfieri fought against the NCO during the war.
edges.evidence_quote: È il clan Alfieri che, durante la guerra contro la NCO di Raffaele Cutolo , offre una sponda sicura alla Nuova Famiglia in un'area geografica di dominio cutoliano.

descriptions: The Alfieri clan ordered the killing of NCO member Alfonso Rosanova.
edges.evidence_quote: Alfonso Rosanova, ucciso nel 1982, per ordine di Carmine Alfieri

descriptions: The Fabbrocino clan and the Nuova Camorra Organizzata were in a violent feud, with murders on both sides.
edges.evidence_quote: The feud with Cutolo intensified when Cutolo ordered the killing of Fabbrocino's brother Francesco. Fabbrocino later avenged his brother's death by ordering the murder of Cutolo's only son, Roberto, on 19 December 1990.

descriptions: The Fabbrocino clan killed Roberto Cutolo, son of NCO leader Raffaele Cutolo, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Roberto Cutolo who was shot dead by members of the Fabbrocino clan

descriptions: Fabbrocino was targeted by the Nuova Camorra Organizzata, which killed his brother.
edges.evidence_quote: Sia Alfieri che Fabbrocino, per mano della Nuova Camorra Organizzata e per volere di Cutolo, subirono la perdita di un fratello

descriptions: The Galasso clan killed NCO member Vincenzo Casillo in revenge.
edges.evidence_quote: autobomba organizzata dal clan Galasso e dal clan Alfieri come vendetta per l’omicidio commesso in precedenza da parte di Vincenzo Casillo nei confronti di Nino Galasso

descriptions: Clan Gionta killed NCO leaders in Torre Annunziata.
edges.evidence_quote: fanno piazza pulita dei capizona della Nuova Camorra Organizzata di Cutolo a Torre Annunziata

descriptions: The Graziano clan joined the Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: adesione dei Graziano alla Nuova Camorra Organizzata

descriptions: Graziano joined the Nuova Camorra Organizzata in the early 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: l'adesione dei Graziano alla Nuova Camorra Organizzata

descriptions: Clan Matrone opposed the NCO by aligning with the Nuova Famiglia.
edges.evidence_quote: il clan si schierò, unitamente alle famiglie camorristiche dei "Loreto" e dei "Ridosso" - anch'esse di Scafati - con la Nuova Famiglia , cartello criminale nato con l'intento di stroncare le trame e lo strapotere della NCO di Cutolo.

descriptions: Clan Parlato is affiliated with Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: famiglia Parlato ... (affiliata alla Nuova Camorra Organizzata)

descriptions: Clan Sarno emerged after the threat of NCO ended.
edges.evidence_quote: non essendoci più la minaccia della Nuova Camorra Organizzata di Raffaele Cutolo

descriptions: De Stefano cooperated with NCO in drug trafficking and killing Tripodo.
edges.evidence_quote: Tripodo was killed with the help of Camorra boss Raffaele Cutolo, the boss of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO) who worked with the De Stefano’s in drug trafficking.

descriptions: The De Stefanos cooperated with the NCO to kill Tripodo and in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: On 26 August 1976, he was stabbed to death in prison on the request of the De Stefanos with the help of Camorra boss Raffaele Cutolo, the boss of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO) who worked with the De Stefanos in drug trafficking.

descriptions: De Stefano paid NCO to kill Tripodo.
edges.evidence_quote: Il capoclan Tripodo venne ucciso il 26 agosto 1976 dentro il carcere di Poggioreale in Campania da "soldati" della nuova camorra organizzata di Raffaele Cutolo ; quest'ultimo fu pagato 100 milioni di lire dai De Stefano per far assassinare il vecchio boss di Reggio Calabria .

descriptions: Initially cooperative, then turned to conflict after Cutolo demanded a cut from Giuliano's gambling.
edges.evidence_quote: The Giuliano clan had been in good terms with the Nuova Camorra Organizzata, headed by Raffaele Cutolo until the first half of 1979, but the two organizations then broke out into conflict.

descriptions: The Giuliano clan worked to destroy the Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella faida tra Nuova Camorra Organizzata e Nuova Famiglia della prima metà degli anni ottanta, il clan si adopera per annientare Raffaele Cutolo , fondatore e capo della Nuova Camorra Organizzata.

descriptions: Lo Russo clan fought against the NCO as part of the NF.
edges.evidence_quote: The war against the NCO resulted in the victory of the Lo Russo's and other NF clans.

descriptions: Los Charlines are allied with the Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Medellin Cartel , Cali Cartel , Clan del Golfo , Corleonesi clan , Nuova Camorra Organizzata , Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: The Mazzarella clan defeated the NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: dopo la vittoria sulla NCO

descriptions: Ciro Mazzarella had good relationships with NCO boss Vincenzo Casillo.
edges.evidence_quote: He was also seen in the company of Vincenzo Casillo of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata

descriptions: NCO had an alliance with 'Ndrangheta clans.
edges.evidence_quote: had an alliance with numerous Calabrian 'Ndrangheta clans

descriptions: NCO cooperated with 'Ndrangheta by carrying out a murder.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni '70 , in occasione della prima guerra di 'ndrangheta , il boss reggino Paolo De Stefano chiese e ottenne da Raffaele Cutolo , capo della Nuova Camorra Organizzata , l'omicidio di Don Mico Tripodo

descriptions: NCO and 'Ndrangheta cooperated to promote new mafia groups in Apulia.
edges.evidence_quote: la NCO e la 'ndrangheta, sfruttando le loro conoscenze nel mondo carcerario, promossero la nascita di nuovi gruppi mafiosi in Puglia

descriptions: Cutolo established relationships with 'Ndrangheta clans Piromalli, De Stefano, and Mammoliti.
edges.evidence_quote: Cutolo stringe i rapporti con la ' Ndrangheta , in particolare con le cosche Piromalli , De Stefano e Mammoliti .

descriptions: NCO members collaborated with 'Ndrangheta clans in Calabria.
edges.evidence_quote: Bianchi trovò rifugio in Calabria, dove collaborò con clan locali, in particolare nella zona tirrenica cosentina. Qui, insieme ad altri affiliati della NCO, partecipò a diverse azioni criminali, rafforzando i legami tra la camorra e la 'ndrangheta.

descriptions: Both organizations inspired rituals and oaths of Puglian mafia groups.
edges.evidence_quote: furono sequestrati quaderni e lettere su cui erano riportati riti e giuramenti delle organizzazioni mafiose ispirate alla Nuova Camorra Organizzata di Raffaele Cutolo e alla 'Ndrangheta calabrese

descriptions: NCO established strong ties with Banda della Magliana.
edges.evidence_quote: The NCO also established strong ties with the ... Roman Banda della Magliana

descriptions: Banda della Magliana is listed as an ally of NCO in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Nuova Grande Camorra Pugliese , Banda della Magliana , Turatello Crew , 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: NCO was allied with Banda della Magliana.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Banda della Magliana

descriptions: NCO had a representative in the Banda della Magliana.
edges.evidence_quote: Raffaele Cutolo ... indicò Nicolino Selis - uno dei capi della Banda della Magliana ... quale referente della NCO nella capitale

descriptions: Cutolo made agreements with the Banda della Magliana.
edges.evidence_quote: Cutolo stringe anche accordi con le bande lombarde di Renato Vallanzasca ... e la Banda della Magliana romana.

descriptions: NCO had a representative within the Banda della Magliana, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Nicolino Selis ... referente di Cutolo nella Banda della Magliana a Roma.

descriptions: NCO fought a war with other Camorra clans for control of illegal activities.
edges.evidence_quote: la NCO pretese di imporre il suo controllo su tutte le attività illecite nel napoletano e ciò determinò una guerra

descriptions: Cutolo drew inspiration from the rituals of the Bella Società Riformata.
edges.evidence_quote: Cutolo si ispirò, inizialmente, ai rituali della Bella Società Riformata

descriptions: The NCO clashed with entrepreneurial cartels including Bardellino.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli scontri tra NCO e cartelli “imprenditoriali” (Zaza, Nuvoletta, Bardellino e alleati) si alimentarono della rendita del contrabbando.

descriptions: Alfieri was part of the Nuova Famiglia alliance against the NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: Proprio tra fine di questo decennio e i primissimi anni di quello successivo nacque, “d’intesa con Cosa nostra”, la Nuova Famiglia (NF) — asse Bardellino-Nuvoletta-Alfieri — concepita per contrastare l’espansione della NCO sul territorio campano.

descriptions: Fabbrocino clan killed Cutolo's son, indicating conflict with NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: Cutolo's son ... was shot dead by members of the Fabbrocino clan

descriptions: Ciro Sarno, after leaving NCO, founded the Sarno clan.
edges.evidence_quote: diede vita, con i fratelli, al clan Sarno

descriptions: The NCO killed Turatello without Mafia consent, causing conflict between NCO and Corleonesi.
edges.evidence_quote: The murder of Turatello was done without the consent of the Sicilian Mafia, and as Turatello was a close friend of Luciano Leggio and Frank Coppola, it was an insult to their honor.

descriptions: NCO and De Stefano 'ndrina cooperated in drug trafficking and murder.
edges.evidence_quote: Domenico Tripodo, a powerful 'Ndrangheta boss of the time, was stabbed to death in prison on the request of the De Stefano 'ndrina, and with the help of Camorra boss Raffaele Cutolo, the boss of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO) who worked with the De Stefano's in drug trafficking.

descriptions: Cutolo drew inspiration from the Garduna criminal association.
edges.evidence_quote: Cutolo si ispirò ... alla confraternita della garduna

descriptions: The Licciardi group was opposed to the NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: A Secondigliano, il gruppo Licciardi si collocò tra i protagonisti destinati a contare nella contrapposizione alla NCO.

descriptions: NCO had an alliance with Nuova Grande Camorra Pugliese.
edges.evidence_quote: in addition to the Nuova Grande Camorra Pugliese

descriptions: NGCP is a branch of NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: Cutolo founded a separate branch of the NCO in Apulia called the Nuova Grande Camorra Pugliese (NGCP) in 1981

descriptions: Nuova Camorra Pugliese was founded as a direct offshoot of Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1981 il boss camorrista Raffaele Cutolo affidò a Pino Iannelli, Alessandro Fusco e Giosuè Rizzi il compito di fondare in Puglia un'organizzazione di diretta emanazione della Nuova Camorra Organizzata, che prese il nome di Nuova Camorra Pugliese.

descriptions: NCO capizona Aldo Vuto co-founded the Nuova Camorra Pugliese, indicating a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: Aldo Vuto, boss tarantino, cofondatore, con Antonio Modeo, della Nuova Camorra Pugliese.

descriptions: The Nuova Camorra Speciale is a splinter group of NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'Nuova Camorra Speciale' ... alla quale aderì anche il clan Belforte

descriptions: NF was formed to contrast NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: The clash ... led to the formation of the Nuova Famiglia (NF) to contrast Cutolo's predominant NCO

descriptions: NCO was at war with Nuova Famiglia.
edges.evidence_quote: This savage war caused ... the Sicilian Mafia to accommodate an agreement between the two warring clans, favouring the Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: The Nuova Famiglia was formed to counter the expansion of the NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: Proprio tra fine di questo decennio e i primissimi anni di quello successivo nacque, “d’intesa con Cosa nostra”, la Nuova Famiglia (NF) — asse Bardellino-Nuvoletta-Alfieri — concepita per contrastare l’espansione della NCO sul territorio campano.

descriptions: The Nuova Camorra Organizzata and Nuova Famiglia were in conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: durante la lotta tra Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO) e Nuova Famiglia (NF)

descriptions: NCO and Nuova Famiglia fought a war from 1978 to 1983.
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra la NCO e la Nuova Famiglia : guerra che scoppiò dopo che l'8 dicembre 1978 le principali famiglie malavitose napoletane decisero di confederarsi in un unico cartello denominato Nuova Famiglia per combattere lo strapotere di Raffaele Cutolo

descriptions: The two organizations were at war in 1982.
edges.evidence_quote: nel 1982 durante la guerra tra Nuova Camorra Organizzata e Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: The Nuova Famiglia was created specifically to fight and eliminate the NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: Alla fine del 1978 nasce la cosiddetta Nuova Famiglia , formatasi da una precedente alleanza denominata "Onorata Fratellanza", una confederazione di clan creata ad hoc per eliminare i cutoliani.

descriptions: The Nuova Famiglia was the rival organization that killed NCO member Vincenzo Casillo.
edges.evidence_quote: Pasquale Galasso e Carmine Alfieri, un tempo capi indiscussi della cosiddetta Nuova Famiglia e responsabili reo-confessi dell'omicidio di Casillo

descriptions: NCO was supplanted by Nuova Famiglia.
edges.evidence_quote: It was eventually supplanted by the Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: Ciro Sarno joined the Nuova Famiglia after the decline of NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: unitisi, dopo il declino della NCO, ai clan della Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan was a key part of the anti-Cutolo (NCO) alliances.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan Nuvoletta di Marano, fortemente intrecciato con Cosa nostra, consolidò un profilo di potere e relazioni che ne farà un cardine delle alleanze anti-cutoliane.

descriptions: NCO member Casillo was forming an alliance with the Clan Nuvoletta, betraying the NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: Cillari confiderà in seguito a Galasso che Enzo Casillo era stato l'esecutore materiale dell'omicidio di Roberto Calvi, su commissione della mafia e attraverso il clan Nuvoletta, con cui lo stesso Casillo stava tessendo una nuova alleanza, tradendo la NCO.

descriptions: Sacra Corona Unita was founded in response to Nuova Camorra Organizzata's expansion attempts in Puglia.
edges.evidence_quote: Nasce in risposta al tentativo della Nuova Camorra Organizzata di Raffaele Cutolo di espandersi in Puglia.

descriptions: NCO established strong ties with Sacra Corona Unita.
edges.evidence_quote: The NCO also established strong ties with the Apulian Sacra Corona Unita

descriptions: NCO founded Sacra Corona Unita as a subgroup.
edges.evidence_quote: Raffaele Cutolo, entrusted Pino Iannelli and Alessandro Fusco the task of founding an organization in Apulia to be directly controlled by the Nuova Camorra Organizzata, the organization was named Nuova Camorra Pugliese, later called Sacra Corona Unita.

descriptions: Cutolo created a branch of the Sacra Corona Unita in 1979, which later rebelled for independence.
edges.evidence_quote: oltre che con la Sacra Corona Unita pugliese (da lui fu creato un ramo nel 1979 capeggiato dai fratelli Spedicato e Guerrieri che gli si ribellò successivamente per la sua indipendenza)

descriptions: NCO was hostile to the Sicilian Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: It was distinctly hostile to the Sicilian Mafia

descriptions: Cutolo of NCO opposed Cosa Nostra activities in Campania.
edges.evidence_quote: Cosa nostra , difatti, era particolarmente invisa a Raffaele Cutolo , che si oppose alle attività dei mafiosi siciliani in Campania

descriptions: Cutolo sought to counter the advance of Cosa Nostra in Campania.
edges.evidence_quote: solo con un'organizzazione forte ed unita Napoli e la Campania avrebbero potuto contrastare la forte avanzata dell'organizzazione siciliana

descriptions: NCO had an alliance with Turatello Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Turatello Crew

descriptions: Turatello Crew is listed as an ally of NCO in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Nuova Grande Camorra Pugliese , Banda della Magliana , Turatello Crew , 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: NCO was allied with Turatello Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Turatello Crew

descriptions: The NCO clashed with entrepreneurial cartels including Zaza.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli scontri tra NCO e cartelli “imprenditoriali” (Zaza, Nuvoletta, Bardellino e alleati) si alimentarono della rendita del contrabbando.

descriptions: The Nuova camorra pugliese later broke free from ties with the Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel giro di pochi anni, tuttavia, l'organizzazione criminale si liberò dai vincoli con la camorra cutoliana

descriptions: Nuova Camorra Pugliese was a branch of Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: founding the branch of the NCO in Apulia, known as the Nuova Camorra Pugliese

descriptions: The Nuova camorra pugliese originated as a branch of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: La Nuova camorra organizzata pugliese (NCOP) nasce all'inizio degli anni '80 come 'costola' della Nuova Camorra Organizzata di Raffaele Cutolo

descriptions: The Nuova Famiglia was formed to oppose the NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: Bardellino was the main exponent of the Nuova Famiglia (NF), a confederation of clans that was formed to contrast the growing power of the predominant Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO), led by Raffaele Cutolo.

descriptions: Nuova Famiglia was in conflict with Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: he joined the Nuova Famiglia confederation against the Nuova Camorra Organizzata

descriptions: Nuova Famiglia was formed to oppose the NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: It was formed to contrast the growing power of Raffaele Cutolo's Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO).

descriptions: The Nuova Famiglia was formed to oppose the Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: He was one of the leaders of the Nuova Famiglia, created in the 1980s to face the rising power of Raffaele Cutolo's Nuova Camorra Organizzata.

descriptions: Nuova Famiglia was at war with Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: The Moccia clan was always a loyal member of the Nuova Famiglia in the war against the Nuova Camorra Organizzata led by Raffaele Cutolo.

descriptions: The Nuova Famiglia was formed to oppose the Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: The Nuova Famiglia ... was created ... to face Raffaele Cutolo's Nuova Camorra Organizzata

descriptions: Infobox lists Nuova Camorra Organizzata as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Nuova Camorra Organizzata (defunct)

descriptions: The Nuova Famiglia was formed to oppose the Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: It was formed to contrast the growing power of Raffaele Cutolo's Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO).

descriptions: Nuova Famiglia was formed to oppose the NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: con l'obiettivo di contrastare la NCO di Cutolo.

descriptions: Nuova Famiglia was formed to oppose the NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra il 1979 ed il 1981 si ha una confederazione di clan camorristici, chiamata la Nuova Famiglia , in cui confluivano i Nuvoletta , il clan dei Casalesi con Antonio Bardellino , Umberto Ammaturo , il clan Galasso e il clan Alfieri, vicina a Cosa nostra per contrastare la NCO di Raffaele Cutolo .

descriptions: Nuova Famiglia was opposed to the Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: organizzazione che si opponeva alla Nuova Camorra Organizzata di Raffaele Cutolo

descriptions: The Nuova Famiglia was formed to oppose the Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: che si contrapponeva alla Nuova Camorra Organizzata di Raffaele Cutolo

descriptions: Nuova Famiglia was formed to oppose the Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: La Nuova Famiglia è stata un' organizzazione camorristica nata alla fine degli anni settanta del XX secolo per contrastare la Nuova Camorra Organizzata di Raffaele Cutolo.

descriptions: Nuova Famiglia was founded to oppose the Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: La Nuova Famiglia è stata un' organizzazione camorristica nata alla fine degli anni settanta del XX secolo per contrastare la Nuova Camorra Organizzata di Raffaele Cutolo.

descriptions: Nuova Famiglia opposed the NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: affiliato alla Nuova Famiglia , che si opponeva alla NCO

descriptions: Nuova Camorra Organizzata is listed as an ally of Nuova Mala del Brenta in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Cosa Nostra, Nuova Camorra Organizzata (defunct)

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan, as part of the Nuova Famiglia, fought against the NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: Si arriva inevitabilmente alla faida tra Nuova Camorra Organizzata e Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: Puca clan was a part of or allied with NCO, as Puca was Cutolo's right hand.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Puca ... was an Italian Camorrista, and the right hand of Raffaele Cutolo, boss of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO).

descriptions: SCU was created to counter the power of NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: The Sacra Corona Unita was created to counter the overwhelming power in the prisons and on the Apulian territory of some of the more established mafia organisations, such as the Campania families united in Raffaele Cutolo's Nuova Camorra Organizzata.

descriptions: SCU was formed in opposition to NCO's expansion attempts.
edges.evidence_quote: Come risposta al tentativo di Cutolo di espandersi in Capitanata, la 'Ndrangheta diede vita alla Sacra Corona Unita

descriptions: Società foggiana originated as a branch of Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: L' organizzazione criminale nasce all'inizio degli anni 1980 come "costola" della Nuova Camorra Organizzata di Raffaele Cutolo

descriptions: Vollaro clan opposed NCO by siding with Alfieri clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The Vollaro clan was one of the first clans to take sides with the powerful Alfieri clan from Piazzolla di Nola, led by Carmine Alfieri against the Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO).

descriptions: The FRS was embedded within ARDE.
edges.evidence_quote: Edén Pastora ... organized the Sandinista Revolutionary Front (FRS) – embedded in the Democratic Revolutionary Alliance (ARDE)

descriptions: The Errol Flynns are mentioned alongside the 7 Mile Killers as comparable Detroit street gangs, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Like other Detroit street gangs, such as their Westside Detroit counterparts in the late 1970s; the Nasty Flynns (later the NF Bangers), and 7 Mile Killers or 7 Mile Dogs or the drug consortiums of the 1980s such as Young Boys Inc., Pony Down, Best Friends, Black Mafia Family and the Chambers Brothers, the Errol Flynns grew out of the racial and economic unrest that transformed Detroit in the late 1960s and 1970s.

descriptions: GAS Gang was formed from the merger of Y28s and Tiny OC.
edges.evidence_quote: This convinced members of Y28s and Tiny OC that they needed to unite together as one, leading to GAS Gang being created.

descriptions: Y28s and Tiny OC united to form GAS Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Y28s and Tiny OC had formed a rivalry with Peckham -based gangs, and at one point gang members were caught unarmed by Peckham gang members, leading to one of their members being stabbed. This convinced members of Y28s and Tiny OC that they needed to unite together as one, leading to GAS Gang being created.

descriptions: Y28s merged with Tiny OC to form GAS Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The Y28s would later join up with Tiny OC to form GAS Gang.

descriptions: The French Connection used funds stolen by the Carlingue to set up drug laboratories.
edges.evidence_quote: An agent of Henri Lafont , a member of the Carlingue (French auxiliaries of the Gestapo ), under the Vichy regime , he used part of the funds stolen by the Carlingue during the war to create drug laboratories near Marseille .

descriptions: Carbone and Spirito, leaders of the French Connection, joined the Carlingue during World War II.
edges.evidence_quote: During World War II, Carbone and Spirito joined the Carlingue, which collaborated with the Germans in France; in return, the local civilian authorities in Marseille were expected to ignore their criminal activities.

descriptions: The Gang des Tractions Avant was composed of former members of the Carlingue militia.
edges.evidence_quote: made up of surviving members of the Carlingue militia

descriptions: Bomber-Raiders is a Bandidos support club.
edges.evidence_quote: During the arrests, a member of the Bandidos support club Bomber-Raiders was wounded after opening fire on police in Saint-Dizier; he was subsequently charged with attempted murder.

descriptions: Ierinò managed drug trafficking together with Colombian cartels.
edges.evidence_quote: Il traffico veniva gestito insieme al Cartello del Golfo e ai cartelli colombiani

descriptions: The Molè obtained cocaine from Colombian cartels.
edges.evidence_quote: la cocaina presa dai cartelli colombiani

descriptions: Morabito collaborated with Colombian cartels in the 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 1990s, the Morabito 'ndrina expanded their operations through money laundering and cocaine trafficking in collaboration with Colombian drug cartels.

descriptions: Pelle 'ndrina has contacts with Colombian drug cartels for cocaine trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan is active in the international trafficking of cocaine, for which it has contacts with the Colombian drug cartels

descriptions: The Pelle 'ndrina has contacts with Colombian cartels for cocaine trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: È attiva nel traffico internazionale di cocaina, per la quale ha contatti con i cartelli colombiani

descriptions: Vangone-Limelli clan had contacts with Colombian narcotraffickers.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Gallo detto 'o pazz ... avrebbe contatti con narcotrafficanti colombiani

descriptions: Tommy Adams, a member of the syndicate, gained an $80 million credit line from Colombian drug cartels.
edges.evidence_quote: Tommy Adams is suspected of establishing connections to other international criminal organisations including ... gaining an $80 million credit line from Colombian drug cartels.

descriptions: The Galician Mafia is allied with Colombian cartels.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Colombian cartels , Mexican drug cartels , British crime firms , French Milieu , Gang de la Brise de Mer , Camorra , Sicilian Mafia , 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: Lebanese mafia is allied with Colombian cartels per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: American Mafia , Armenian mafia , Colombian cartels , Comanchero MC , Corsican mafia , Greek mafia , Romanian Mafia , Hells Angels MC , Mongols MC , Nomads MC , Notorious MC , Sicilian Mafia

descriptions: Marielitos have aligned with Colombian cartels for drug trafficking and enforcement.
edges.evidence_quote: In some cases they have aligned themselves with American Mafia families and Colombian cartels to set up drug pipelines and working for them as enforcers.

descriptions: Colombian drug cartels are listed as allies of Montenegrin mafia in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Penose , Serbian mafia , 'Ndrangheta , Camorra , Sacra Corona Unita , Colombian drug cartels , Mexican drug cartels

descriptions: Colombian cartels trust Moroccan mafia traffickers to receive and distribute cocaine in Europe.
edges.evidence_quote: Moroccan gangs in Amsterdam, Utrecht, and Rotterdam have a firm foothold in importing cocaine from South America, particularly from Peru and Colombia, where Colombian cartels trust Dutch- and Belgian-Moroccan drug traffickers in Antwerp to receive and distribute these drugs.

descriptions: No Limit Soldiers does business with Colombian crime groups for contract killings.
edges.evidence_quote: Colombian crime groups as well as criminal organizations from the Dutch Penose are known for doing business with the Afro-Curaçaoan gang in the committing of contract killings.

descriptions: Penose cooperates with Colombian cartels in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: In the drugs business they closely cooperate with British firms and Colombian cartels for the importation and exportation of ecstasy and cocaine

descriptions: Ivankov established ties between Russian mafia and Colombian drug cartels.
edges.evidence_quote: Within a year, he built an international operation that included but was not limited to narcotics, money laundering, and prostitution and made ties with the American Mafia and Colombian drug cartels

descriptions: Solntsevskaya has links to Colombian drug cartels for cocaine trade.
edges.evidence_quote: The organization is also involved in the international cocaine trade, with its links to Colombian drug cartels brokered by the Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan.

descriptions: Texis Cartel transported drugs manufactured by Colombian drug cartels.
edges.evidence_quote: The cartel transported drugs manufactured by Colombian drug cartels through northern El Salvador towards North America.

descriptions: Texis Cartel worked with Colombian drug cartels.
edges.evidence_quote: It typically worked with drug cartels from Colombia and Mexico.

descriptions: Infobox lists Colombian drug cartels as allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Colombian drug cartels , Mexican drug cartels

descriptions: Colombian cartels are listed as allies of Turkish mafia in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: British firms , Albanian mafia , Sicilian Mafia , Azerbaijani mafia , Pakistani mafia , Russian mafia , Colombian cartels , Bulgarian mafia , Serbian mafia , Sinaloa Cartel , Cartel of the Suns

descriptions: The West End Gang formulated ties to Colombian cartels.
edges.evidence_quote: Since that time, the gang has formulated ties to the Montreal Mafia, the Cosa Nostra, the Hells Angels, and Colombian cartels.

descriptions: West End Gang's cocaine and hashish were supplied by associates in Florida connected to Colombian and South American cartels.
edges.evidence_quote: che gli venivano forniti da alcuni soci in Florida , a loro volta collegati con i cartelli colombiani e sudamericani

descriptions: PCE-SR is listed as an ally of FARC dissidents in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: PCE-SR

descriptions: The Liverpool mafia is listed as an ally of the Kinahan Organised Crime Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Liverpool mafia

descriptions: The Huyton Firm is a group within the Liverpool mafia, sometimes working together or fighting for control.
edges.evidence_quote: The Liverpool mafia has had several powerful groups over the years, some of which have worked together, or fought over control of the cartel at different times. Notable figures include ... the Huyton Firm ...

descriptions: The American Mafia is allied with African-American organized crime groups.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ...African-American mob, Armenian mafia, Chaldean mafia, Corsican mafia, Dixie Mafia, Greek mafia, Jewish-American mob, Lebanese mafia, Mexican Mafia, Russian mafia, Serbian mafia, various motorcycle gangs...

descriptions: Artur Margaryan is a splinter group of Baghdad Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Other splinter groups include ChinaSquadNyalenda Base, Chief Squad, Nyamasaria Massive, Kenda Kenda, Kondele Baghdad for Peace, Karamojong Boys, Saba Saba, Artur Margaryan, Kebago, and American Marines.

descriptions: The 36 Boys fought turf battles against Skinheads.
edges.evidence_quote: In the beginning of the 1990s the 36 Boys fought against turf battles with Nazis and Skinheads in the Jungfernheide park.
